name: Mint Valley
description_short: Mint Valley Federal Credit Union is a member-owned credit union serving Washington with auto loans, savings accounts, and credit-building programs starting at rates as low as 5.49% APR.
description_long:
Mint Valley Federal Credit Union is a not-for-profit, member-owned financial institution operating in Washington state. Based in Longview, WA, the credit union serves its community by offering financial products and services designed for members rather than shareholders. Like all federal credit unions, Mint Valley is regulated and insured by the NCUA (National Credit Union Administration), providing member deposits protection similar to FDIC insurance at traditional banks.

Mint Valley offers a comprehensive range of consumer financial products including auto loans (as low as 5.49% APR), RV and boat loans (as low as 7.25% APR), and secured loans (as low as 2.10% APR). The institution provides savings accounts and share certificates for members looking to grow their funds, online and mobile banking for account access, and specialized credit-building and credit repair loan programs. Members can make payments online, text the credit union, and access online banking services. The website highlights promotional savings rates up to 2.00% APR on select accounts.

Mint Valley distinguishes itself through a personalized member service model, with staff members recognizing and greeting customers by their first name. According to member testimonials featured on their website, the credit union emphasizes accessibility for those with credit challenges, with one member reporting approval for a vehicle loan the same day despite previous credit concerns. The credit union positions itself as a community-focused alternative to traditional banks, emphasizing relationship banking and member advocacy.

As a credit union, Mint Valley's primary advantage is its not-for-profit structure and member-owned model, which theoretically allows for competitive rates and lower fees than commercial banks. However, credit unions typically have smaller branch networks and may have stricter membership eligibility requirements. The website content does not specify membership eligibility criteria, asset size, or detailed fee structures, limiting transparency for prospective members evaluating the institution.
services: RV and boat loans (7.25% APR and above)
pros: Auto loan rates starting at 5.49% APR, competitive with market offerings
Secured loans available at rates as low as 2.10% APR for those with collateral
Specialized credit-building and credit repair loan programs for members looking to improve credit scores
Member-focused service model with personalized recognition and relationship banking approach
Accessible to members with credit challenges, demonstrated by same-day loan approvals for applicants with past credit issues
Online, mobile, and in-person banking options including text payment capability
Not-for-profit credit union structure typically offering lower fees and higher savings rates than commercial banks
cons: Website does not clearly specify membership eligibility requirements or geographic service area beyond Washington
No detailed fee schedule provided on website for account maintenance, overdrafts, or other services
Limited transparency on savings account APY rates, only promotional rates mentioned (up to 2.00%)
No information about branch locations, ATM network access, or shared branching partnerships
Credit repair and credit-building loan terms, requirements, and success metrics not detailed on website
best_for: Washington residents seeking competitive auto and RV/boat financing with personalized service
Consumers with credit challenges or poor credit history looking for credit-building loan programs
Members prioritizing relationship banking and community-focused financial institutions over large commercial banks
Individuals needing secured loans who have collateral but limited access to traditional lending
diagnosis: Mint Valley Federal Credit Union is best for Washington residents seeking competitive loan rates and personalized member service, particularly those with credit challenges who need credit-building or repair loan options. The primary caveat is limited transparency on the website regarding membership eligibility, fee structures, branch locations, and detailed terms for specialized credit programs, requiring prospective members to contact the institution directly for complete information.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Mint Valley — Credit Union in LONGVIEW, WA | CreditDoc
meta_description: Mint Valley — NCUA-insured credit union in LONGVIEW, WA. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
